scripts.watch: npm run new-patch && ng build --watch --configuration development
scripts.branchLN: sh -c 'git checkout -b $BRANCH && git branch --set-upstream-to=origin/$BRANCH && git push -u origin $BRANCH'
scripts.branch: node -e "const b=process.argv[1]; require('child_process').execSync(`git checkout -b ${b} && git branch --set-upstream-to=origin/${b} -- `, {stdio:'inherit'})"
scripts.branchN: node -e "const b=process.argv[1]; require('child_process').execSync(`git checkout -b ${b} && git branch --set-upstream-to=origin/${b} && git push -u origin ${b} -- `, {stdio:'inherit'})"
scripts.delete: git checkout develop && git branch -D @{-1} && git push
scripts.merge: git checkout develop && git merge @{-1} --no-edit && git push
scripts.mergeB: git checkout develop && git merge @{-1} --no-edit && git push --
scripts.mergeb: node -e "const b=process.argv[1]; require('child_process').execSync(`git checkout ${b} && git merge @{-1} --no-edit && git push -- `, {stdio:'inherit'})"
scripts.mergedel: git checkout develop && git merge @{-1} --no-edit && git push && git branch -d @{-1} && git push origin --delete @{-1}
scripts.push: npm run new-patch && aic2 -t conventional && git push
scripts.push-all: npm run new-patch && aic2 -a -t conventional && git push
